subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having caused me to hear Thy Call, and guided me unto Thy Path, and shown me the traces of Thy Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما اسمعتنی ندآئک و هدیتنی الی صراطک و اریتنی آثار قلمک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for service, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
